content.text:
Seam chosen: `lib/features/renderer/providers` — `FractalViewInputBounds` view snapshot normalization.

Changed:
- Added `normalizeRotationComponent(...)`
- Added `normalizeRotation(...)`
- Updated `normalizeView(...)` to sanitize rotation as part of the same view invariant.

Bug found/fixed:
- Externally loaded/preset/replayed `FractalViewState.rotation` could carry `NaN`/`Infinity` into controller state and then shader uniforms.
- Fix preserves finite rotation values, falls back to current finite rotation for non-finite candidates, then `0.0` if both are invalid.

Tests added/updated:
- `test/fractal_view_input_bounds_test.dart`
  - Characterizes non-finite rotation component handling.
  - Extends full snapshot normalization test to cover pan + zoom + rotation together.

Validation:
- Passed: `/home/xel/flutter/bin/dart analyze lib/features/renderer/providers/fractal_view_input_bounds.dart test/fractal_view_input_bounds_test.dart`
- Passed: `/home/xel/flutter/bin/flutter test --no-test-assets test/fractal_view_input_bounds_test.dart`
- Broader attempted: `/home/xel/flutter/bin/flutter test --no-test-assets test/fractal_controller_clamp_test.dart test/fractal_view_input_bounds_test.dart`
  - Blocked by pre-existing missing generated imports:
    - `lib/core/modules/builders/escape_time/catalog.dart`
    - `lib/core/modules/builders/raymarched_3d/catalog.dart`

Next likely bug-finding seam:
- `FractalController.updateRotation(...)` in `lib/features/renderer/providers/fractal_provider.dart`; direct gesture-driven rotation updates may still bypass this normalization path.
